title: AI Project Risk Assessment
description: Assess AI project readiness against governance, safety, and policy controls.

steps.title: Project Profile
steps.description: Project owner, scope, and external impact.

fields.name: project_name
fields.label: AI Project Name
fields.default: Sample AI Project

fields.name: project_owner
fields.label: Project Owner
fields.default: John Doe

fields.name: department
fields.label: Department
fields.default: Data Science

fields.name: project_description
fields.label: Project Description
fields.default: AI-powered customer service chatbot

fields.name: ai_type
fields.label: Ai Type
fields.default: GenAI / LLM

fields.name: processes_personal_data
fields.label: Processes Personal Data
fields.help: If Yes, privacy approval controls become critical.

fields.name: a1_explanation
fields.label: A1 Explanation
fields.default: Processes customer name, email, and transaction history for context

fields.name: a2_explanation
fields.label: A2 Explanation
fields.default: PDPWG approval obtained on 2026-01-15

fields.name: b1_explanation
fields.label: B1 Explanation
fields.default: Chatbot is available on public website and mobile app

fields.name: b2_explanation
fields.label: B2 Explanation
fields.default: Security review completed, pentest scheduled for Q2 2026

fields.name: c1_explanation
fields.label: C1 Explanation
fields.default: Reduce customer service response time and handle 24/7 inquiries

fields.name: c2_explanation
fields.label: C2 Explanation
fields.default: Expected 60% reduction in response time, 40% cost savings

fields.name: d1_explanation
fields.label: D1 Explanation
fields.default: AI system owner is the Head of Customer Service

fields.name: ai_owner_name
fields.label: Ai Owner Name
fields.default: Jane Smith

fields.name: d2_explanation
fields.label: D2 Explanation
fields.default: Human agents can take over conversation at any time

fields.name: override_mechanism
fields.label: Override Mechanism
fields.default: Escalation to human agent button always visible

fields.name: e1_explanation
fields.label: E1 Explanation
fields.default: Tested with 1000+ test cases including edge cases

fields.name: test_coverage
fields.label: Test Coverage
fields.default: Normal cases, edge cases, adversarial inputs

fields.name: e2_explanation
fields.label: E2 Explanation
fields.default: Falls back to search-based FAQ if LLM unavailable

fields.name: fallback_description
fields.label: Fallback Description
fields.default: Rule-based fallback with human escalation

fields.name: e3_explanation
fields.label: E3 Explanation
fields.default: Daily monitoring of response quality and user satisfaction

fields.name: monitoring_metrics
fields.label: Monitoring Metrics
fields.default: Response time, user rating, escalation rate, accuracy

fields.name: f1_explanation
fields.label: F1 Explanation
fields.default: Bias testing conducted across demographic groups

fields.name: bias_check_method
fields.label: Bias Check Method
fields.default: A/B testing with diverse user groups

fields.name: f2_explanation
fields.label: F2 Explanation
fields.default: Automated bias detection with manual review process

fields.name: correction_mechanism
fields.label: Correction Mechanism
fields.default: Weekly bias review with model retraining pipeline

fields.name: g1_explanation
fields.label: G1 Explanation
fields.default: Users are informed they are chatting with AI assistant

fields.name: notification_method
fields.label: Notification Method
fields.default: Clear disclosure at start of chat session

fields.name: g2_explanation
fields.label: G2 Explanation
fields.default: Can provide reason codes for recommendations

fields.name: explanation_method
fields.label: Explanation Method
fields.default: Natural language explanations with confidence scores

fields.name: general_notes
fields.label: General Notes
fields.default: Sample AI project data for testing purposes. This represents a well-governed AI project that passes all hard stops and scores high on governance dimensions.

fields.name: assessor
fields.label: Assessor
fields.default: Risk Assessment Engine
